title: The Crew Heads for Loguetown
description: On pages 13–16, the crew heads for loguetown focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as news of Luffy’s bounty spreads across the East Blue as the crew sails toward their next destination.
scene: On pages 13–16, the crew heads for loguetown focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as news of Luffy’s bounty spreads across the East Blue as the crew sails toward their next destination.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ain't you a strong one, missy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hawkeyes! Just what've you come here for!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No need to get antsy, I've no business with the rest of you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: to be hanging around on an island such as this... your captain is quite the easygoing man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ah, Hawkeys. Quite a rare guest I've got today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm not in such a good mood right now but... have you come for a fight?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmph... As if I'd want to settle things with a man with only one arm.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I came across some interesting pirates,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And I was reminded of that story you told me long ago.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: that story about an interesting little kid in a certain village...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So you've come out at last,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: captain of the red-haired pirates red-Hair SHANKS

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey, everyone! Let's drink! It's time for a party!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: drink? But weren't you. Grumbling over your hangover just now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You dumbass! How could a man not drink on a day as joyous as this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hawkeyes! You sit down and have a drink too!

summary: This part shifts the story from local East Blue battles to the wider pirate world reacting to Luffy’s new bounty.
